title: Agent Provider Concurrent Pressure
objective: Prove OpenClaw can process multiple overlapping local agent turns through the provider path, keep the gateway healthy, return correct responses, and leave no leaked child processes.

phases.title: Provision Agent Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway before applying concurrent provider pressure.

phases.title: Concurrent Provider Turns
phases.intent: Send several real local agent messages at the same time and verify all hit the provider and return correct responses.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/run-concurrent-agent-turns.mjs --env {env} --count 3 --session-prefix kova-agent-provider-concurrent --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --expected-text KOVA_AGENT_OK --timeout 120

phases.title: Post-Concurrency Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after concurrent agent/provider work.
